graph_meta.title: Kairo Phantom 76-Scenario Gauntlet — Agent Memory Graph
graph_meta.description: Structured knowledge graph encoding every scenario, pass criteria, prerequisites, and retry rules for all 12 test agents. Used by GitHub Actions matrix runners and local orchestrators.

scenarios.name: Blank Page — Write from scratch
scenarios.user_prompt: // Write an executive summary for a Q3 2026 quarterly business review covering revenue growth, market expansion, and team headcount. Use professional business tone with headings.
scenarios.expected: Multi-paragraph executive summary with H1/H2 headings
scenarios.retry_condition: Fewer than 2 paragraphs OR missing any of 3 required topics OR system prompt leakage

scenarios.name: Pre-Written — Fix formatting
scenarios.user_prompt: // Fix all formatting inconsistencies, make line spacing uniform at 1.15, ensure all body text is 11pt Calibri, fix broken numbering in lists, and justify all paragraphs properly. Preserve all content and heading structure.
scenarios.retry_condition: Formatting inconsistency remains OR numbered list broken OR content lost

scenarios.name: Pre-Written — Grammar/tone correction
scenarios.user_prompt: // Rewrite this in formal business English with proper grammar, consistent terminology, and professional tone suitable for a board presentation.
scenarios.retry_condition: Any slang remains OR grammar errors persist OR system prompt leakage

scenarios.name: Table Manipulation — Summarize table data
Tracked Changes — AI with revision tracking
scenarios.prerequisite: Track Changes must be ON before Alt+M

Adeu injection: all W1‑W10 use Adeu (not clipboard). Verify native Track Changes.
Adeu fallback: when Word is not open, falls back to safe‑docx.
Adeu fallback: when neither Adeu nor safe‑docx is available, falls back to clipboard.
Style mapping: "Heading 1" ↔ "Heading1" corrected automatically.
Table formatting: injected table preserves column widths and borders.
Nested lists: multi‑level bullet lists preserve indentation.
Images in Word: injected image maintains position and text wrapping.
Comments: AI can add a comment to a selected range.
Track Changes author: AI edits are attributed to "Kairo AI" in the revision.
Password‑protected document: Kairo shows "Document is protected" overlay.
Read‑only document: Kairo offers to save a copy.
Very large document (100+ pages): Adeu processes without timeout.
Document with embedded Excel chart: structure extracted correctly.
Document with legacy .doc format: converted and processed.
Concurrent human + AI editing: no conflicts, both edits preserved.

Multi‑slide: maximum 5 bullets per slide enforced.

Background Fault Injection — Continuous
// protocol: command text triggers ghost session.
// protocol: non‑command text does nothing.
/// global command affects entire document.
//? query returns information without modifying document.
//! critical command works and is logged at elevated level.
Sentinel: system prompt leakage blocked and retried.
Sentinel: blocklist ("Content Agent", etc.) blocks injection.
Undo: single Ctrl+Z reverts entire AI operation as one atomic unit.
Undo: Ctrl+Z after multiple operations correctly stacks.
Context fallback: UIA failure → clipboard → farscry OCR → prompt only.
Context fallback: all methods fail → user sees error overlay.
Intent Gate clarity check: ambiguous prompt triggers clarification overlay.
Intent Gate risk check: forbidden path request blocked.
Intent Gate document‑type routing: Word → WordSpecialist, etc.
Intent Gate intent extraction: categorises correctly (rewrite, summarise, …).
// kami book: continuous‑flow HTML book.
// kami podcast: audio overview generated.
// kami podcast --local: offline audio via synthesizer.
// kami subtitles: SRT/VTT file generated.
// kami quiz: quiz questions generated from document.
// kami flashcards: study flashcards generated.
// kami mindmap: Markdown mind map saved.
// kami html: standalone HTML file.
// kami all: all formats generated in one command.
Voice dictation (Alt+V): speak → transcription → ghost‑write.
Moonshine primary: English dictation with <150ms latency.
whisper.cpp fallback: non‑English dictation auto‑routes.
Voice activity detection: speech start/stop detected correctly.
Screen context (Alt+Shift+M): farscry extracts text from screenshot.
Wake word "Hey Kairo": triggers voice listening.
Wake word false positive rate: <1 per hour in quiet room.
TTS: sherpa‑onnx speaks acknowledgement chime.
TTS: speaks AI response aloud (accessibility mode).
Offline voice: all components work without internet.
Noisy environment: VAD still detects speech.
Long dictation (2+ minutes): no timeout or truncation.
Voice + text combined: speak a command, type additional context.
Screen context + voice: point at something and speak what to do.
Privacy: audio never leaves device (network monitor verification).
SSO: user authenticates via Logto. JWT validation works.
SSO: expired JWT rejected.
SSO: unauthenticated user cannot ghost‑write.
SPIFFE agent identity: certificate issued and embedded in document.
Cryptographic audit chain: tampered record detected.
SIEM export: CEF, LEEF, JSON formats all valid.
Compliance scanner: HIPAA PII blocked.
Compliance scanner: GDPR PII blocked.
Compliance scanner: PCI credit card patterns blocked.
Compliance override: //! compliance‑override works and is audited.
RBAC: user with "intern" role cannot use restricted agents.
RBAC: user with "partner" role can use all agents.
Prompt injection firewall: 20 known attacks blocked.
Prompt injection: zero false positives on 50 legitimate prompts.
WASM sandbox: escape attempts blocked (10 million fuzz iterations).
WASM sandbox: tampered plugin signature rejected.
Supply chain: cargo audit clean, cargo deny clean.
Network: zero outbound connections in offline mode.
SBOM: generated and committed.
OWASP matrix: all 10 controls have source annotations.
Preference convergence: format match ≥0.95 by session 10.
Cross‑session recall: preference remembered after restart.
Forgetting: old, unreinforced preferences decay.
Multi‑app memory: Word preferences don't contaminate Excel.
PAHF clarification: confidence <0.4 triggers overlay, not injection.
Learning loop: rejection → different approach next time.
KMB‑1 benchmark: score ≥0.88 (CI) or ≥0.95 (local).
Cold start: first session produces reasonable output.
Memory vault migration: schema upgrade preserves data.
Memory export: preferences exportable as Markdown.
Hotkey‑to‑first‑token latency: <100ms (pre‑warmed).
Ghost‑typing speed: "Natural" mode 200‑280 WPM.
Rapid Alt+M spam: 15 presses in 3 seconds, no crash.
Memory stability: 100 ghost‑writes, RSS growth <10%.
Network drop: offline fallback activates within 2s.
Clipboard failure: enigo fallback works, no data loss.
CPU spike: ghost‑write completes during stress‑ng.
Sidecar crash: auto‑restart within 3s, no user impact.
Large document (100+ pages): context capture <2s.
24‑hour continuous run: no crashes, no memory leaks.
Windows: KairoSetup.exe installs silently, Alt+M works in <90s.
macOS: drag‑to‑Applications .dmg installs and works.
Linux: install.sh or .AppImage installs and works.
Onboarding wizard: 3‑step flow completes in <60s.
Model auto‑download: first voice dictation downloads model.
Self-Correction Loop — Recover from malformed LLM responses
Context Overload — Smart chunking on >10MB document files
Concurrency Lockout — Alt+M throttle and clipboard race avoidance
